summary: Iteration 34: Tested scheduled automatic backups feature. All backend APIs (12/12 tests) and frontend UI working correctly.

issues: Minor React hydration warning in console about <span> inside <select> - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: scheduler.py: Clean implementation with background asyncio task checking every 5 minutes
scheduler.py: Properly handles auto/manual labels and cleanup of old backups beyond max_snapshots
admin_tools.py: Backup settings stored in settings collection under backup_settings key
admin_tools.py: List endpoint excludes 'data' field for performance, get endpoint returns full data
BackupManager.js: Good UX with toggle, frequency/max_snapshots selects, and snapshot list with action buttons
api.js: All 6 backup API methods properly implemented (getBackupSettings, updateBackupSettings, listBackups, getBackup, createBackupNow, deleteBackup)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple manual backup snapshots during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scheduled backups feature fully functional. Scheduler runs background loop every 5 minutes checking if auto backup is needed based on frequency setting. Backup snapshots stored in 'backups' collection with id, label (auto/manual), created_at, size_bytes, collections, and data fields.

backend_backup_settings_api.get_settings: PASS - GET /api/admin/backup-settings returns enabled, frequency, max_snapshots

backend_backups_api.list_backups: PASS - GET /api/admin/backups returns list without data field, sorted by created_at desc
backend_backups_api.create_backup: PASS - POST /api/admin/backups/create-now creates snapshot and returns backup_id
backend_backups_api.get_backup: PASS - GET /api/admin/backups/{id} returns full backup data for download
backend_backups_api.not_found_handling: PASS - Returns 404 for non-existent backup IDs
backend_backups_api.auth_required: PASS - All endpoints return 401 without auth token

backend_scheduler.startup: PASS - Logs 'Backup scheduler started' on app startup
backend_scheduler.shutdown: PASS - Logs 'Backup scheduler stopped' on app shutdown

frontend_backup_page.automatic_backups_section: PASS - Shows at top with Clock icon
frontend_backup_page.enabled_toggle: PASS - Switch component toggles enabled/disabled state
frontend_backup_page.create_backup_now_btn: PASS - Creates manual backup and updates list immediately
frontend_backup_page.snapshots_list: PASS - Shows label (M for Manual, A for Auto), timestamp, size, collections count
frontend_backup_page.delete_button: PASS - Removes snapshot from list after confirmation
frontend_backup_page.settings_persistence: PASS - Toggle and select changes save to backend with toast notification

frontend_existing_features.export_panel: PASS - Still present with 16 collection checkboxes
frontend_existing_features.import_panel: PASS - Still present with merge/replace modes
